name: zerocode-local-models
description: Local-first language model providers for ZeroCode.

label.description: Optional label shown alongside models from this provider.

endpoint.description: Base URL for the Ollama OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

models.description: Optional comma-separated model ids to use when model discovery is unavailable.

maxInputTokens.description: Fallback input token limit used when the provider does not report one.

maxOutputTokens.description: Fallback output token limit used when the provider does not report one.

imageInput.description: Enable image input for models behind this provider.

defaultForChat.description: Mark the first discovered model in this provider group as the chat default.

label.description: Optional label shown alongside models from this provider.

endpoint.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

apiKey.description: Optional API key used as a Bearer token.

models.description: Optional comma-separated model ids to use when model discovery is unavailable.

maxInputTokens.description: Fallback input token limit used when the provider does not report one.

maxOutputTokens.description: Fallback output token limit used when the provider does not report one.

imageInput.description: Enable image input for models behind this provider.

defaultForChat.description: Mark the first discovered model in this provider group as the chat default.

walkthroughs.title: Set up local models
walkthroughs.description: Connect Ollama, LM Studio, or another OpenAI-compatible local server to ZeroCode chat.

steps.title: Add Ollama in one command
steps.description:
Use the recommended preset to add a local Ollama server at `http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1`.
[Add Ollama](command:zerocode.localModels.addOllama)
[Install a recommended model](command:zerocode.localModels.installRecommendedOllamaModel)
[Open Ollama docs](https://ollama.com/download)

steps.title: Add LM Studio or another compatible server
steps.description:
If you use LM Studio, vLLM, LocalAI, or another OpenAI-compatible endpoint, pick the matching preset.
[Add LM Studio](command:zerocode.localModels.addLMStudio)
[Add OpenAI-Compatible Provider](command:zerocode.localModels.addOpenAICompatible)

steps.title: Choose and tune chat models
steps.description:
Open the model manager to enable the provider, inspect discovered models, and adjust per-model settings such as `temperature` or `maxTokens`.
[Manage chat models](command:zerocode.localModels.manageModels)

steps.title: Open local chat and start using the model
steps.description:
Launch local chat after setup. If no local models are ready yet, ZeroCode will guide you to the next recommended setup step. If discovery is unavailable, set the provider group's `models` field to a comma-separated fallback list and then refresh.
[Start local chat](command:zerocode.localModels.startChat)
[Refresh providers](command:zerocode.localModels.refreshProviders)

viewsWelcome.contents:
Use local-first models in ZeroCode.
[Start Local Chat](command:zerocode.localModels.startChat)
[Add Ollama](command:zerocode.localModels.addOllama)
[Install a Recommended Ollama Model](command:zerocode.localModels.installRecommendedOllamaModel)
[Add LM Studio](command:zerocode.localModels.addLMStudio)
[Manage Chat Models](command:zerocode.localModels.manageModels)
[Open Setup Guide](command:zerocode.localModels.openWalkthrough)
